name: Standard
prompt: facing the camera, leaning slightly forward with a straight back, and keeping their chest 10 to 45 degrees from the camera

name: Arms crossed
prompt: waist-up professional stance with arms folded confidently and a slight 30-degree body turn

name: Angled Face
prompt: Head turned 30-45 degrees away from the lens, eyes maintaining direct contact with the camera, emphasizing jawline definition and facial symmetry

name: Hands at Hips
prompt: Confident power-stance, elbows flared slightly outward, hands resting firmly on the waist, creating a strong triangular silhouette with the upper body

name: Over the Shoulder
prompt: Body rotated 90 degrees away from the camera, head turned back toward the lens over the leading shoulder, creating a sense of depth and mystery

name: Leaning In
prompt: Subject leaning forward from the waist toward the lens, weight shifted onto the front foot, creating an intimate and engaging perspective with a shallow depth of field

name: Hands In Pockets
prompt: Relaxed posture, thumbs hooked into pockets or hands tucked loosely, weight shifted to one leg for a natural, asymmetrical body line

name: Lean Sideways
prompt: Body weight tilted toward a vertical axis, one shoulder dropped slightly lower than the other, creating a dynamic diagonal line through the torso

name: Fists Up
prompt: High-energy athletic stance, hands loosely balled into fists held at chest height, shoulders squared, conveying readiness and assertive drive
